# PRD: <product / feature name>

> Owner: **Product Manager** · Consumed by: Architect, Project Manager, Design, QA.
> Gate 1 (Discovery → Design) requires this to be complete with **testable** acceptance criteria.

## Problem
What user problem are we solving, and for whom? Why now?

## Goals & non-goals
- **Goals:** …
- **Non-goals (explicitly out of scope):** …

## Users & scenarios
Primary users and the key scenarios they need to accomplish.

## Requirements
Numbered, each independently verifiable.
- R1 — …
- R2 — …

## Acceptance criteria
Given/When/Then statements that QA can test directly.
- AC1 — Given … when … then …

## Success metrics
How we'll know it worked (post-release).

## Open questions
- [ ] … *(must be resolved or consciously deferred before gate 1)*
